text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is the stage for my<n>first direct
clash with the Golden<n>Generation. Today, I cross
blades<n>with...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and Grass Wonder! I<n>answer the
spirited gazes of these<n>twin peaks of the Golden
Generation<n>with this—"I shall be victorious."

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: And now, ladies and gentlemen, it istime to begin the tumultuous Act II ofOrigins of the Centurial Overlord!
